PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-30-2022 Continued To Apr-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear and an Order to Show Cause will be issued to Petitioner in propria persona Ramilaben Mangubhai Patel to appear on Apr-27-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Petition should not be taken off calendar. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not reported.
